task_description: Find a nearby hotel for a selected stay period within a lower price range and open the details for the chosen hotel.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The zoomed-in crop shows the row of circular action buttons under the tab labeled 评价. The semitransparent red X is centered on the middle light-blue circular button with a map-pin icon and the label 附近, between 保存 on the left and 发送到手机 on the right. In the full-screen view, Google Maps is open to 茶具文物馆, with the place details panel on the left and the map with a red location pin on the right.
caption.action: Click the 附近 button with the map-pin icon in the place action row.
caption.expectation: Google Maps should switch into a nearby search mode for this location, updating the left panel and/or map with nearby place options.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a dropdown-style list of nearby categories under the search bar, and the semitransparent red X is centered on the middle list item labeled 酒店, with the smaller text 附近的 beneath it. The item has a bed icon on the left, indicating hotels. In the full-screen view, Google Maps is open for 茶具文物馆, with the place details panel on the left, the nearby category list expanded near the top-left, and the map on the right showing the museum area.
caption.action: Click the 酒店 nearby category item with the bed icon in the suggestion list.
caption.expectation: Google Maps should select the hotels nearby category, updating the left panel and map to show nearby hotel results.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows the hotel search filters area in Google Maps. A semitransparent red X is centered on the left date field displaying 4月24日周五, immediately to the right of a small calendar icon and before the up/down chevrons for the date selector. This is a UI control in the top filter panel. In the full-screen view, Google Maps search results for 酒店 are open, with the left sidebar showing hotel listings and the right side showing a map filled with hotel price markers around Hong Kong.
caption.action: Click the left check-in date field showing 4月24日周五 in the date filter bar.
caption.expectation: The check-in date selector should become active, likely opening a calendar or date-picker so the date can be changed.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows an open date-picker calendar. A semitransparent red X is centered on the day number 27 in the calendar grid, beneath the month header for 2026年4月. Nearby dates 24 and 25 are highlighted as currently selected, indicating this is a clickable date cell inside the calendar popup. In the full-screen view, Google Maps is open in Chrome with hotel search results for Hong Kong on the left and a hotel-price map on the right; the date filters are at the top-left, and the calendar dropdown is expanded from the date field.
caption.action: Click the date cell labeled 27 in the open calendar popup.
caption.expectation: The clicked date should become selected as part of the travel date range, and the date picker may update the highlighted range or close if the selection is complete.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows an open date-picker calendar for 2026年4月, and the semitransparent red X is centered on the date cell labeled 28, immediately to the right of the already highlighted 27. This is a clickable date cell inside the calendar popup. In the full-screen view, Google Maps is open in Chrome with Hong Kong hotel results in the left sidebar and hotel price markers on the map; the date filters are expanded at the top-left with the calendar dropdown still open.
caption.action: Click the date cell labeled 28 in the open calendar popup.
caption.expectation: The selected travel dates should update to include the 28th as the end date, and the calendar may close or refresh the results for the new date range.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a horizontal teal slider line with a round teal handle at the far right end, and a semitransparent red path runs leftward along the slider track, indicating the handle should be dragged from right to left across a substantial distance. In the full-screen view, Google Maps hotel results for Hong Kong are open in Chrome. The hotel filters appear at the top of the left panel, and this slider is the price-range control currently shown beneath the date and guest filters, labeled with a range from $0 to $2,700+.
caption.action: Click-and-hold on the round handle at the right end of the price slider, drag along the shown path to the left across the slider track, then release.
caption.expectation: The maximum price limit should decrease, narrowing the hotel results and refreshing the listings and map markers to match the lower price range.

caption.observation: Cropped image shows The cropped image shows a hotel result card in the left results panel, with a semitransparent red X centered over the middle of the listing row between the hotel name text and the thumbnail image. The visible listing includes the hotel name 帝国酒店, a rating line with review count, amenity icons such as Wi‑Fi and dining, and a green price tag on the thumbnail reading HK$474. In the full-screen view, Google Maps in Chrome is displaying Hong Kong hotel search results on the left and a city map on the right with route dots and hotel markers. The click target is a search result object in the list, not a toolbar control or blank region.
caption.action: Click the hotel result card for 帝国酒店 in the left results list.
caption.expectation: The hotel listing should become selected, and Google Maps should open that hotel's detailed information panel or focus the corresponding place on the map.
